nasb.text: Also Hosah, one of the sons of Merari had sons: Shimri the first (although he was not the firstborn, his father made him first),

esv.text: And Hosah, of the sons of Merari, had sons: Shimri the chief (for though he was not the firstborn, his father made him chief),

cnv.text: 米拉利的子孫何薩有幾個兒子，長子是申利、

ccb.text: 米拉利的后代何萨的长子是申利，他本来不是长子，是被他父亲立为长子的。
